queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Benthic Software: ImpExpPro 1.x%' AND publisher = 'Benthic Software';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Benthic Software: ImpExpPro 1.x%' AND publisher = 'Benthic Software' AND version_compare(version, '1.1.0.22') < 0);
